chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يَجُوزُ أَنْ يُؤَاجَرَ بِهِ الْأَرْضُ وَ مَا لَا يَجُوزُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 126 – What is allowed if you rent out the land and what is not allowed

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/340)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/340)
text: لَا تَسْتَأْجِرِ الْأَرْضَ بِالْحِنْطَةِ ثُمَّ تَزْرَعَهَا حِنْطَةً .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from Safwan, from Ibn Muskan, from Al Halby,
from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Do not rent out with the wheat, then cultivate wheat’.
en.sarwar: 3. Abu Ali al-Ash’ariy has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from Safwan from ibn Muskan from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘You must not rent land in exchange for wheat where you plant wheat.’”
